user.title: Connect to iEMS
user.description: Paste the API key from your iEMS portal (Settings → Connect Home Assistant).

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to iEMS
reauth_confirm.description: Your iEMS API key is no longer valid (it may have been rotated or revoked). Paste a fresh key from your iEMS portal (Settings → Connect Home Assistant).

error.invalid_api_key: API key format is invalid. It should start with iems_ and be copied exactly from the portal.
error.auth_failed: Could not authenticate with iEMS. The key may be revoked or expired — generate a new one in the portal.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach iEMS cloud. Check your Home Assistant has internet access and try again.

abort.already_configured: This iEMS account is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: iEMS reconnected with your new API key.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: That API key belongs to a different iEMS account. Paste the key for the account this integration was set up with, or remove and re-add the integration.
